perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a young woman in a blue fluffy dress and a light blue hat standing in a warehouse-style store, holding a large, pink and white house-shaped box. She smiles and gestures excitedly toward the camera. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up of a price tag and then back to the woman as she flips the box over to show the detailed illustrations of beauty products on the back. (3) She continues to point at different parts of the box while talking, eventually holding it up and gesturing to the camera as if offering it as a gift. The background is filled with stacks of similar products on pallets.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic pop-style background music plays throughout the video. A female voice speaks in an enthusiastic, high-pitched tone in Mandarin, describing the product. (2) Sound effects like 'ding' or 'whoosh' are heard when text or product details are highlighted. (3) The vocal intensity increases towards the end, maintaining a friendly and persuasive tone until the music fades out at the conclusion.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '超殺價格 英國Cath Kid' (Amazing price, UK Cath Kid) and '聖誕倒數禮盒' (Christmas Advent Calendar) appear in bright, large fonts with emotional emphasis. (3) Functional Text: Detailed price tag information showing '153372 CATH KIDSTON 24 DAYS ADVENT CALENDAR' and '$799'. (4) Functional Text: Subtitles tracking the speaker's dialogue about the contents of the calendar and its value as a gift.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Price reveal -> Detailed Content Explanation -> Gifting Suggestion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator standing in the center of the frame.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman wearing a light blue bucket hat, a white long-sleeve shirt, and a blue textured/fluffy sleeveless dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse aisle with industrial shelving and pallets of stacked holiday gift boxes.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the Cath Kidston Advent Calendar available at Costco, highlighting its low price and its potential as a gift for multiple friends by splitting the 24 items inside.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator specifically showcases the brand logo, the store logo, and the price tag while encouraging viewers to purchase it.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy presentation style with bright, emoji-filled text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets budget-conscious gift buyers in Taiwan looking for international brands at wholesale prices.
